findings.justification: The download_export_file handler (registered via admin_init) verifies only a nonce but performs no capability check (current_user_can), allowing any authenticated user who possesses the 'product-csv' nonce to download the full product CSV export regardless of their role.

The user-controlled $_GET['filename'] value is passed to set_filename() after only wp_unslash() with no validation of path separators or traversal sequences, potentially allowing an attacker to read or serve arbitrary server-side files if set_filename accepts relative paths.

The user-controlled $_POST['filename'] value is passed to set_filename() after only wp_unslash() with no sanitization of path traversal characters, sharing the same class of risk as the GET-based filename parameter in download_export_file.
